title: IT303 ARCHIVED - Know-how and similar payments to non-residents - Canada.ca
content:
## IT303 ARCHIVED - Know-how and similar payments to non-residents

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
This bulletin deals with the taxation of payments by persons resident in Canada to non-residents for what is commonly referred to as ''know-how''.

## Ways to access the information
- Read the publication Online format it303-e.html
